title: Revert to Version 9 and delete all other versions

requirements.text: Revert the entire application (both frontend and backend) to the state it was in at Version 9, discarding all changes made in Versions 10 through the current latest version. The codebase must exactly reflect Version 9's functionality, design, and data models with no residual code, styles, or logic from any later version.

quotes: Delete all version and keep only version 9

acceptanceCriteria: The application code matches Version 9 exactly in terms of features, pages, components, and backend logic.
No code, styles, animations, or data model changes introduced after Version 9 are present.
All pages and routes that existed in Version 9 render correctly.
All pages and features added after Version 9 are removed.
The backend actor reflects only the data models and functions present in Version 9.
The frontend reflects only the components, pages, and styles present in Version 9.

constraints: The result must reflect Version 9 exactly — do not carry forward any feature, animation, style, or backend change introduced in Version 10 or later.
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui (immutable paths).
nonGoals: Adding any new features beyond what existed in Version 9.
Preserving any animations, design enhancements, or backend changes introduced after Version 9.
Keeping seller management, OTP flows, refund management, or any other feature added post-Version 9 unless they were present in Version 9.
